query: SELECT '561' as ac, p.city, p.state, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM contactPhones cp JOIN contacts c ON cp.contactId = c.id JOIN properties p ON c.propertyId = p.id WHERE SUBSTRING(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cp.phoneNumber, '+1', ''), '(', ''), ')', ''), '-', ''), 1, 3) = '561' GROUP BY p.city, p.state ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2HoMEWBM6m36fKT.7b334260735d --database RDbAfwHQBDqo37pina3pDu --execute SELECT '561' as ac, p.city, p.state, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM contactPhones cp JOIN contacts c ON cp.contactId = c.id JOIN properties p ON c.propertyId = p.id WHERE SUBSTRING(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(cp.phoneNumber, '+1', ''), '(', ''), ')', ''), '-', ''), 1, 3) = '561' GROUP BY p.city, p.state ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 5;
